preguntas.pregunta: [1/20] Try our five-day starter course and your memory will immediately be ___ efficient than before.
[2/20] Zurich has been voted the ___ city in the world to live in.
[3/20] Do you find that, as you get older, your memory is getting ___ reliable than it used to be?
[4/20] Zurich's beautiful parks and open areas make it one of the ___ cities in the world.
[5/20] With each memory training exercise, you will find that you can think ___ clearly.
[6/20] Thanks to its efficient transport system, Zurich is one of the cities where you can travel ___ comfortably.
[7/20] I hate my current job because I am working ___ hours than ever.
[8/20] With the third ___ crime rate, Zurich is certainly one of the safest places.
[9/20] I am ___ stressed now than I have ever been before because of the short deadlines.
[10/20] Tokyo is actually the ___ city in the world, with a population of over thirty-five million people.
[11/20] I love my new lifestyle because I can relax more, so I am much ___ than before.
[12/20] Shanghai in China is the ___ growing city in the world according to recent statistics.
[13/20] Since I started exercising and eating ___ than before, I have gained a lot of energy.
[14/20] The Vatican City is probably the world's ___ capital city, with just under 1000 people living inside.
[15/20] Prag is definitely ___ than any of the other European cities I have visited so far.
[16/20] The train probably gets you to London ___ than going by car.
[17/20] The second night at the resort was even ___ than the first night because the air-conditioning broke down.
[18/20] This was not the ___ hotel I've ever stayed in, as it was located on one of the busiest streets.
[19/20] Going by train is definitely ___ than driving through the heavy city traffic.
[20/20] The cost of living in Asuncion is low, making it one of the ___ capital cities in the world.
